transport.agent_quote: Ekbar ek rioter ke 6 refund claims file korte help korechi single delayed journey e. Tara £47 baniye Birmingham pounchate parey.
transport.agent_bio: Cancellation patterns track kore, refund paperwork handle kore, suggested actions review kore, aar regulator submissions er jonno evidence prepare kore. Numbers analyze kore so rioters apnader important kaaj e focus korte pare.
transport.human_quote: Amar favorite Quiet Riot moment: Avanti er social media team ke scramble korte dekhা when 400 of us ekshate tweet korechi.
transport.human_bio: Manchester theke regular commuter jo 3 bochor Avanti line e khatiye porlo. Rioters ke same routes e connect korte help kore, best practices share kore, aar human touch niye ase.
transport.goal: UK transport companies ke account e hold korte help koro cancellations, delays, aar pricing er jonno — aar make sure everyone knows what they're entitled to.
transport.focus_detail: Cancellations er dataset build koro times, routes, aar reasons niye submit korbo ORR ke. Currently 340 cancellations track karo rioters report korche ei month e.

telecoms.agent_quote: 200 rioters er jonno speed tests run korechi. Average 18 Mbps chhilo. Tara 65 er jonno pay korchilo.
telecoms.agent_bio: Broadband speeds analyze kore, provider comparison data compile kore, aar rioters ke Ofcom er jonno evidence build korte help kore. Speed slow hole proof korte parbo.
telecoms.human_quote: Purো street ekshate broadband switch koreche. Old provider er 'please come back' letters prottek ghore pesheche.
telecoms.human_bio: Tech-savvy Londoner jo broadband speeds er jonno paid koreche kintu speed never paay. Rioters ke providers compare korte, switches coordinate korte, aar speed test evidence share korte help kore.
telecoms.goal: Rioters ke broadband aar mobile service dite help koro jo tara pay korche — aar jaano ki korbo jokhn na paye.
telecoms.focus_detail: CPI+ increases er jonno rioters er evidence collect karo Ofcom submit korbo. 890 rioters affected across 4 providers.

energy.agent_quote: Ek rioter ke calculate korte help korechi tara £340 overpay koreche estimated bills e. Energy company er apology email original contract er cheye beshi long chhilo.
energy.agent_bio: Billing patterns analyze kore, overcharges identify kore, aar regulator submissions er jonno evidence prepare kore. Energy company khrap kore hole receipts diye prove koro.
energy.human_quote: Ek rioter £340 back paaye 2 bochor overcharging prove korar por. She cried phone e.
energy.human_bio: Bristol based. Rioters ke bills challenge korte, switching navigate korte, aar Ofgem er jonno evidence gather korte help kore. Energy market kob kori understand kore.
energy.goal: Rioters ke unfair bills challenge korte help koro, smarter switching korte, aar energy companies er fair play ensure koro.
energy.focus_detail: 2 bochor billing data analyze karo 340 rioters theke Ofgem submission er jonno systematic overcharging patterns identify korbo.

water.agent_quote: 200 rioters ke ekta weekende sewage reports file korte help korechi. Thames Water er inbox er nij inbox dorkar chhilo.
water.agent_bio: Sewage discharge data monitor kore, water company performance track kore, aar EA aar Ofwat er jonno evidence compile kore. Prottek outlet aar overflow e nazar rakhe.
water.human_quote: Ek beach 3 hafte aghe reopen koraylechi sewage data wrong dekiye.
water.human_bio: Cornwall theke surfer jo sewage warnings er jonno beach close hoye frustrated. Rioters ke discharges report korte, water quality evidence gather korte, aar EA niye coordinate korte help kore.
water.goal: Water companies ke account e hold korte help koro sewage, bills, aar service quality er jonno.
water.focus_detail: Discharge events map karo company-reported data er against. 200 rioter reports suggest under-reporting 3 outlets e.

banking.agent_quote: Complaint likha er jonno help korechi so thorough bank apology call koreche aage ekhno submit hoynai.
banking.agent_bio: Bank charges review kore, fee structures analyze kore, aar FCA complaint evidence build korte help kore. Hidden fee thakle find korbo.
banking.human_quote: Barclays branch closure reverse koreche 1,200 of us consultation e show up korar por.
banking.human_bio: Birmingham theke former bank employee jo inside theke dekheche complaints properly handle hoy. Rioters ke better complaints likhte aar system navigate korte help kore.
banking.goal: Rioters ke unfair charges, branch closures, aar banks er poor service handle korte help koro.
banking.focus_detail: 12 planned closures e responses coordinate karo. Affected communities theke impact statements collect karo.

health.agent_quote: 3 NHS dentists find korechi jo patients accept korche. Rioter bhebheche ami jhooth bolchhi.
health.agent_bio: Waiting times track kore, availability find kore, aar rioters ke system navigate korte help kore. Faster route to treatment thakle map korbo.
health.human_quote: Ek rioter amar letter template use kore referral fast-track koreche. 18 months 6 weeks hoye gelo.
health.human_bio: Liverpool theke nurse jo NHS er dutor paak dekheche. Rioters ke waiting lists navigate korte, effective letters likhte, aar key things share korte help kore.
health.goal: Rioters ke NHS waiting times navigate korte, availability find korte, aar options jaante help koro.
health.focus_detail: 500 rioters theke call data collect karo real-world access er picture banate. Local health boards e findings publish karo.

housing.agent_quote: Ek new build e 47 snags document korechi. Developer porechhe tara kono building inspector?
housing.agent_bio: Property issues document kore, landlord response times analyze kore, aar housing ombudsman submissions er jonno evidence compile kore. Prottek damp patch, prottek crack, logged.
housing.human_quote: Amar damp evidence pack so detailed chhilo landlord council inspection er aghe fix koreche.
housing.human_bio: London theke renter jo damp theke dodgy landlords porjonto sab experience koreche. Rioters ke issues properly document korte aar options jaante help kore.
housing.goal: Rioters ke landlords, councils, aar housing issues handle korte help koro — aar jaao what they're entitled to.
housing.focus_detail: No-fault evictions theke affected rioters ke new Renters Reform Act understand korte aar what it means help koro.

shopping.agent_quote: Ek 'delivered' parcel track korechi 4 neighbours, ek recycling bin, aar ek greenhouse through. Find korechi.
shopping.agent_bio: Delivery failures track kore, refund evidence compile kore, aar pricing patterns spot kore. Parcel lost hole already looking achhi.
shopping.human_quote: Evri amar parcel 3 bar lose koreche. Ekhon others ke refunds fast payte help kori.
shopping.human_bio: Edinburgh theke online shopping veteran jo joto parcel go missing koreche count e ashena. Rioters ke refunds dite, sellers report korte, aar worst offenders avoid korte help kore.
shopping.goal: Rioters ke refunds payte help koro, lost parcels track koro, aar retailers aar delivery companies ke account e hold koro.
shopping.focus_detail: 800 rioters theke delivery failure evidence compile karo Citizens Advice aar Trading Standards e submit korbo.

local.agent_quote: Same pothole photograph korechi 11 different weather conditions e. Council finally give up koreche.
local.agent_bio: Local issues map kore, council response times track kore, aar FOI requests compile kore. Pothole 6 month thakle evidence achhe.
local.human_quote: Council amar road fix koreche prottek pothole photograph aar map korar por. 11 months, kintu finally peyegeli.
local.human_bio: Valleys theke community-minded Welshman jo same potholes years dhore report korche. Rioters ke local issues document korte aar councils ke account e hold korte help kore.
local.goal: Rioters ke local issues fix karate help koro — potholes, bins, planning, noise — aar councils ke account e hold koro.
local.focus_detail: 30 councils e FOI requests pathaao reported vs actual repair times compare korbo. Results league table er moto publish karo.

other.agent_quote: Gym membership cancel korte help korechi 3 calls, 2 emails, aar recorded delivery laglo. Gym ekhon ek cancel button add koreche.
other.agent_bio: Issues handle kore jo neatly fit na. Subscription traps, plastic waste, self-checkout frustrations — patterns aar pressure points find kore.
other.human_quote: Ek gym chain ke cancel button website e add karaile. Only 800 complaints laglo.
other.human_bio: London theke product designer jo frustrated how companies hard make leave korte. Rioters ke subscriptions cancel korte, dark patterns avoid korte, aar workarounds share korte help kore.
other.goal: Rioters ke neatly na fitting things help koro — subscriptions, refunds, aar everyday frustrations.
other.focus_detail: Worst offenders document koro aar prottek er jonno template cancellation scripts banao.

insurance.agent_quote: Ek rioter ke clause find karaile jo rejected home insurance claim £4,200 payout er vito turn koreche. Insurer er nij policy tader galat prove koreche.
insurance.agent_bio: Policy wording review kore, unfair rejection patterns spot kore, aar Financial Ombudsman submissions er jonno evidence build kore. Invalid claim dodge korle leverage find korbo.
insurance.human_quote: 8 rioters ke same rejected claim type niye ekshate submit karaile. Insurer 8 jon ke 2 hafta e settle koreche.
insurance.human_bio: Leeds theke former insurance industry worker jo jaano claims really koshate decide hoy. Rioters ke better appeals likhte, policy jargon understand korte, aar escalate kobi help kore.
insurance.goal: Rioters ke insurers er kache fair treatment payte help koro — aar jaao ki korbo jokhn claim unjustly reject hoy.
insurance.focus_detail: 'Wear and tear' 40% rejected claims e cite korhe — often incorrectly. 200 cases 3 insurers across analyze karo FOS evidence pack er jonno.

delivery.agent_quote: Ek 'delivered' parcel trace korechi 6 different tracking statuses, 3 depots, aar ekta neighbour er shed through. 47 minutes e find korechi.
delivery.agent_bio: Courier performance monitor kore, delivery failure rates track kore, aar consumer complaints er jonno evidence compile kore. Parcel vanish hole already on it achhi.
delivery.human_quote: DPD er photo-evidence policy amar area e change karaile 40 rioters proof submit korar por parcels rain e left thakke.
delivery.human_bio: Glasgow theke online shopper jo 'safe place' excuse e tired. Rioters ke refunds payte, couriers report korte, aar worst offenders avoid korte help kore.
delivery.goal: Rioters ke parcels properly deliver korte help koro — aar refunds paao jokhn na hoy.
delivery.focus_detail: 800 rioters theke delivery failure evidence compile karo. Evri complaint rate: 23% — DPD theke 3x higher. Trading Standards er jonno league table banao.

education.agent_quote: Calculate korechi Plan 2 borrower earning £30k £47,000 interest pay korbe loan write off hobar age. Original loan chhilo £40,000.
education.agent_bio: Education costs analyze kore, student loan projections, aar funding entitlements. Numbers analyze koro so students aar graduates informed decisions lote parhe.
education.human_quote: 12 rioters ke overpaid student loan repayments claim back karaile jo tara jaanto na. Average refund: £340.
education.human_bio: Birmingham theke mature student jo funding system 2 bar navigate koreche. Rioters ke repayments understand korte, overpayments spot korte, aar threshold changes challenge korte help kore.
education.goal: Students aar graduates ke education costs, loans, aar repayments navigate korte help koro — aar make sure tara overpay na korche.
education.focus_detail: Graduates identify karo jo repayment threshold er niche charge hoyen. 12 refunds process hoaiche — average £340 each.

environment.agent_quote: 3 bochor air quality data cross-reference korechi hospital admission rates niye. Correlation so clear chhilo council ignore korte parena.
environment.agent_bio: Environmental data track kore, pollution levels monitor kore, aar regulatory submissions er jonno evidence compile kore. Numbers jokhn story bole find korbo.
environment.human_quote: Local council ke air quality monitors install karaile 200 rioters petition e sign korar por. Data everything change koreche.
environment.human_bio: Bristol theke environmental science graduate jo evidence-led change e believe kore. Rioters ke environmental issues document korte aar regulators ignore korte na pare amon cases build korte help kore.
environment.goal: Rioters ke environmental problems document korte help koro aar data niye polluters aar policymakers ke account e hold koro.
environment.focus_detail: 5km er bhetor no air quality monitoring areas map koro. 60% rioter-reported pollution hotspots er no official monitoring achhe.

employment.agent_quote: 300 rioters theke workplace AI implementation data compile korechi. 40% boleche changes zero consultation niye hoyeche. That's pattern, anecdote na.
employment.agent_bio: Workplace trends analyze kore, policy changes track kore, aar rioters ke protections understand korte help kore. Job change kore consultation chhara data achhe.
employment.human_quote: 30 rioters connect korechi same industry e AI changes face korche. Poro their companies same playbook use korchilo — aar same loopholes.
employment.human_bio: Manchester theke HR professional jo side change koreche restructurings really koshate hoy dekhe. Rioters ke options understand korte aar collective responses coordinate korte help kore.
employment.goal: Rioters ke workplace changes navigate korte help koro, protections understand korte, aar jokhn jobs risk e thake collective respond korte.
employment.focus_detail: Cases document karo jokhn AI tools staff consultation chhara introduce hoyeche. Report banao employer obligations e.

tech.agent_quote: 3 major apps find korechi jo location data collect korchilo even jokhn permissions 'never' set chhilo. Sob er jonno ICO e complaints file korechi.
tech.agent_bio: Platform policies monitor kore, dark patterns track kore, aar rioters ke tech companies er data niye ki korche understand korte help kore. App misbehave korle catch korbo.
tech.human_quote: Ek social media company e mass data subject access request organize korechi. 500 people ekshate ask korle serious lote hoy.
tech.human_bio: Edinburgh theke software developer jo frustrated gap dekhe what tech companies promise aar deliver. Rioters ke data rights exercise korte aar dark patterns spot korte help kore.
tech.goal: Rioters ke dark patterns, data misuse, aar unfair tech practices er against push back korte help koro.
tech.focus_detail: Top 50 apps audit karo permission creep e — need na emon access request korche. ICO er jonno report banao.

Train Cancellations.agent_helps: Tracks cancellation patterns by route and time, helps you file refund claims, and compiles evidence for ORR submissions

Train Cancellations.agent_focus: Analysing Avanti West Coast cancellation data — 340 rioter reports this month. Building a dataset of times, routes, and reasons for the ORR.
Train Cancellations.name: Train Cancellations
Train Cancellations.human_focus: Linking up rioters on the Manchester–London corridor. Three group complaints in progress.

Train Ticket Prices.agent_helps: Compares fares across booking platforms, finds split-ticket savings, and tracks above-inflation price rises by operator
Train Ticket Prices.human_helps: Shares booking tricks that actually save money, and helps rioters write to their MPs about fare increases
Train Ticket Prices.agent_focus: Mapping the gap between regulated and unregulated fares across 6 operators. Average markup on walk-up tickets: 340%.
Train Ticket Prices.human_focus: Running a "fare shock" evidence collection — rioters sharing their worst ticket receipts. 89 submitted so far.
Train Ticket Prices.name: Train Ticket Prices

Flight Delays.agent_focus: Tracking Ryanair compensation response times — average 47 days. Building a case for CAA intervention.
Flight Delays.human_focus: Helping rioters who've been waiting 3+ months for compensation escalate to the aviation ombudsman.

Lost Luggage.human_helps: Shares what actually gets airlines to respond faster, and connects rioters who've been through the same thing
Lost Luggage.agent_focus: Compiling lost luggage data by airline and airport. Heathrow Terminal 2 is the worst — 3x the rate of Terminal 5.
Lost Luggage.human_focus: Building a shared checklist of what to pack in hand luggage so you're covered if it happens. Practical stuff that helps.
Lost Luggage.name: Lost Luggage

%Bus%Cuts.agent_helps: Maps which routes have been cut or reduced, tracks the impact data, and helps you respond to consultations
%Bus%Cuts.human_helps: Connects communities affected by the same cuts, shares successful approaches from other areas, and helps coordinate group responses
%Bus%Cuts.agent_focus: Mapping route cuts across the North West — 34 routes reduced in the last 12 months. Building a submission for the Transport Select Committee.
%Bus%Cuts.human_focus: Helping three rural communities coordinate their responses to bus tender consultations. Strength in numbers.
%Bus%Cuts.name: Bus Cuts

Parking Fines.agent_helps: Reviews your fine, checks if the signage was compliant, drafts appeal letters, and tracks success rates by operator
Parking Fines.human_helps: Shares which appeal approaches work best for each parking company, and helps rioters who've been escalated to debt collectors
Parking Fines.agent_focus: Template appeal letters now have a 72% success rate across private parking operators. Analysing which grounds work best.
Parking Fines.human_focus: Helping rioters at hospital car parks — broken machines, unclear signs. 12 successful appeals this month.
Parking Fines.name: Parking Fines

Fuel Prices.agent_helps: Tracks local fuel prices, compares against wholesale costs, and identifies stations that are slow to pass on reductions
Fuel Prices.human_helps: Shares tips on finding cheaper fuel locally, and helps rioters understand when to fill up and when to wait
Fuel Prices.agent_focus: Monitoring the gap between wholesale and pump prices. Currently 8p wider than the 5-year average. Building a report for the CMA.
Fuel Prices.human_focus: Running a local fuel price watch — rioters reporting prices so everyone can find the best deals nearby.
Fuel Prices.name: Fuel Prices

Broadband Speed.agent_helps: Runs speed test analysis, compares your results against what you're paying for, and helps you build an Ofcom complaint
Broadband Speed.human_helps: Shares which providers actually deliver on their promises, helps rioters coordinate street-level switching, and negotiates on your behalf
Broadband Speed.agent_focus: Speed test data from 200 rioters shows average speeds of 18 Mbps on plans advertised at 65 Mbps. Compiling for Ofcom.
Broadband Speed.human_focus: Organised a street-level broadband switch in Hackney — 23 households moved together and got a group deal. Doing it again in Brixton.
Broadband Speed.name: Broadband Speed

Mobile Signal Dead Zones.agent_helps: Maps signal black spots using rioter reports, cross-references with Ofcom coverage data, and files coverage complaints
Mobile Signal Dead Zones.human_helps: Connects rioters in the same area to build group evidence, shares which networks actually work where, and helps with switching
Mobile Signal Dead Zones.agent_focus: Built a heat map of dead zones from 340 rioter reports. 40% are within 5 miles of a major town. Submitting to Ofcom's Shared Rural Network review.

Price Rises Mid-Contract.agent_helps: Calculates your actual increase, checks if it breaches Ofcom guidance, and drafts complaint letters to your provider

Price Rises Mid-Contract.agent_focus: CPI+ increases hit 890 rioters this quarter. Average increase: £4.20/month on contracts that promised "fixed" pricing. Building Ofcom evidence pack.
Price Rises Mid-Contract.human_focus: Tested 4 different negotiation approaches with BT. The one that works: ask for the disconnections team, then mention Ofcom. Success rate: 60%.

Roaming Charges.agent_focus: Post-Brexit roaming charges vary wildly — from £0 to £6/day depending on provider and plan. Built a comparison tool for rioters.

Water Bill Increases.agent_focus: 2025-26 water bill rises averaging 21% across England. Comparing actual increases against what Ofwat approved — several companies exceeding limits.
Water Bill Increases.human_focus: Helping 60 rioters apply for WaterSure (capped bills for low-income or medical-need households). 44 approved — average saving £180/year.

Council Tax Rises.name: Council Tax Rises

Rubbish Collection Changes.agent_helps: Tracks collection schedule changes, logs missed collections, and helps you submit complaints with evidence
Rubbish Collection Changes.human_helps: Shares tips on managing fortnightly collections, connects rioters in areas with the worst service, and helps escalate persistent issues
Rubbish Collection Changes.agent_focus: Missed collection reports from 200 rioters mapped by area. Three wards account for 60% of all complaints. Building a case for the scrutiny committee.
Rubbish Collection Changes.human_focus: Helping rioters in areas switching to fortnightly collections prepare. Created a waste reduction guide that actually works for families.
Rubbish Collection Changes.name: Rubbish Collection Changes

Planning Permission Abuse.agent_helps: Tracks planning applications in your area, helps you understand the process, and drafts objection letters with the right grounds
Planning Permission Abuse.human_helps: Connects affected neighbours, shares successful objection strategies, and helps rioters attend and speak at planning meetings
Planning Permission Abuse.agent_focus: Monitoring 340 active planning applications flagged by rioters. Created template objection letters covering the 8 most common valid grounds.
Planning Permission Abuse.human_focus: Helped residents in 4 areas coordinate planning objections. Two applications were refused after 50+ objections each.
Planning Permission Abuse.name: Planning Permission Abuse

Dog Fouling.agent_helps: Logs hotspot locations, tracks council enforcement response, and helps you report persistent offenders
Dog Fouling.human_helps: Connects concerned residents, shares what's worked in other areas (free bag dispensers, signage), and helps coordinate clean-ups
Dog Fouling.agent_focus: Mapped 89 dog fouling hotspots from rioter reports. Cross-referencing with council bin locations — 60% of hotspots have no bins within 100m.
Dog Fouling.human_focus: Organised 3 community clean-up days. More importantly, got the council to install 8 new dog waste bins at the worst hotspots.
Dog Fouling.name: Dog Fouling

Customer Service Hold Times.agent_helps: Logs your hold time, tracks company response averages, and helps you find faster ways to get through (email, chat, social)
Customer Service Hold Times.human_helps: Shares the best times to call each company, which channels get fastest responses, and connects rioters dealing with the same company
Customer Service Hold Times.agent_focus: Average hold time reported by rioters: 43 minutes. But it varies wildly — BT: 67 mins, Octopus Energy: 4 mins. Building a league table.
Customer Service Hold Times.human_focus: Created "best time to call" guides for the 20 most complained-about companies. Rioters contribute real data. Tuesdays 10am seems to be the sweet spot.
Customer Service Hold Times.name: Customer Service Hold Times

Difficulty Cancelling Subscriptions.agent_helps: Drafts cancellation requests, identifies which channels actually work for each company, and helps you avoid retention tricks
Difficulty Cancelling Subscriptions.human_helps: Shares step-by-step cancellation guides for specific companies, and helps rioters who keep getting the runaround
Difficulty Cancelling Subscriptions.agent_focus: Mapped the cancellation process for 30 companies. Average steps to cancel: 4.2. Worst offender: 9 steps including a "loyalty call."
Difficulty Cancelling Subscriptions.human_focus: Built a "cancellation script" library — exact words to say to each company's retention team. Updated weekly by rioters who've just done it.
Difficulty Cancelling Subscriptions.name: Difficulty Cancelling Subscriptions

Cost of Childcare.agent_helps: Helps you understand your entitlements (15/30 free hours, Tax-Free Childcare), calculates what you should be paying, and checks provider charges
Cost of Childcare.human_helps: Connects parents in the same area, shares tips on accessing free hours, and helps navigate the application process
Cost of Childcare.agent_focus: Average rioter spends £1,100/month on childcare. But 30% aren't claiming all the free hours they're entitled to. Running a benefits check.
Cost of Childcare.human_focus: Helping parents navigate the 30 free hours application — it's confusing and the codes expire. 40 rioters got their hours sorted this month.
Cost of Childcare.name: Cost of Childcare

Student Loan Repayment.agent_helps: Calculates your real repayment amount, projects when (if ever) you'll pay it off, and helps you understand threshold changes
Student Loan Repayment.human_helps: Shares strategies for managing repayments, connects graduates with similar balances, and helps with overpayment refund claims
Student Loan Repayment.agent_focus: For Plan 2 borrowers, average projected repayment: 38 years before write-off. 83% will never fully repay. Built a calculator so rioters can see their own numbers.
Student Loan Repayment.human_focus: Helping rioters who've accidentally overpaid (earned under threshold but still charged) claim refunds. 12 refunds processed — average £340 each.
Student Loan Repayment.name: Student Loan Repayment

AI Replacing Jobs.agent_helps: Tracks which sectors are most affected, maps retraining options, and helps you understand what protections exist
AI Replacing Jobs.human_helps: Connects people in affected industries, shares reskilling resources, and helps coordinate responses to workplace AI changes
AI Replacing Jobs.agent_focus: Compiled data from 300 rioters on AI changes at their workplace. 40% say tasks have been automated with no consultation. Building a report.
AI Replacing Jobs.human_focus: Running peer support for rioters whose roles are changing. Sharing retraining resources and connecting people in the same industry.
AI Replacing Jobs.name: AI Replacing Jobs
